titles.en: Reward of five hundred rakats of Salaat between two Fridays
Reward of five hundred rakats of Salaat between two Fridays

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ الرَّازِیِّ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنِ النَّبِیِّ ص قَالَ: مَنْ صَلَّی مَا بَیْنَ الْجُمُعَتَیْنِ خَمْسَمِائَهِ رَکْعَهٍ فَلَهُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ مَا یَتَمَنَّی مِنْ خَیْرِهِ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ الرَّازِیِّ عَنِ السَّکُونِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع عَنِ النَّبِیِّ ص قَالَ: مَنْ صَلَّی مَا بَیْنَ الْجُمُعَتَیْنِ خَمْسَمِائَهِ رَکْعَهٍ فَلَهُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ مَا یَتَمَنَّی مِنْ خَیْرِهِ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya al-’Attar from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Ahmad al-Razi from al-Sakuni from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) from The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said: “One who offers five hundred rakats of Salaat between two Fridays, anything good desired by him would be fulfilled by Allah.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya al-’Attar from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Ahmad al-Razi from al-Sakuni from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) from The Prophet (s.a.w.s.) who said: “One who offers five hundred rakats of Salaat between two Fridays, anything good desired by him would be fulfilled by Allah.”
